sglang.title: Tune paged attention parameters for AMD GPU.
sglang.author: whchung
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fine tune SGLang page attention kernel performance on AMD MI GPU for LLM.
Modifications
Changes:

num_kv_splits : 8 -> 16
BLOCK : 64 -> 8
num_warps : 2 -> 1 when kv_group_num is more than 1
waves_per_cu : 4 -> 1 in grouped paged attention kernel

These knobs have been tested with a couple

vllm.title: Apply torch.compile to fused_moe/grouped_topk
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Inspired by sgl-project/sglang@1ebe1d6. This improves the generation latency for deepseek models due to the large number of experts. For DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct we see an increase of 154 -> 163 tokens/s or 5% improvement at bs=1 on H100
script:
VLLM_MLA_DISABLE=1 python benchmarks/benchmark_

vllm.title: [Bugfix] fix moe_wna16 get_quant_method
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #12647
The get_quant_method of moe_wna16 always return moe method, GPTQ-based linear method or AWQ-based linear method, even when the target module is attention layer.

  
    
      vllm/vllm/attention/layer.py
    
    
        Lines 86 to 92
      in
      baeded2

vllm.title: [Core] Silence unnecessary deprecation warnings
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I noticed during testing that I was getting a lot of these deprecation
warnings about local_lora_path:
DeprecationWarning: The 'lora_local_path' attribute is deprecated
     and will be removed in a future version.
     Please use 'lora_path' instead.

The check used for emitting this warning was al
